sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n20424" key="bostruxi/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βοστρῠχ-ίτης</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ῑ], οἶνος</foreign> wine <sense id="n20424.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">made from pressed grapes</tr_>, Aë.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4085.tlg001:15:21" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">15.21</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
